title: pelargonium × paradoxum
intro: Pelargonium × paradoxum, also known as the Red Form or Old Red Rose Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems, due to its high content of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Pelargonium × paradoxum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or essential oils, making it a popular choice for natural remedies and homeopathic treatments.
